LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SPARKART GROUP, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUNE 12, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MAY 14, 2013 AT 4:00 PM. THE COURT HAS THE MOTION AND REPLY. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-21-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Deft And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff SPARKART GROUP, INC.'S Motion to Compel Deposition of Defendant and Request for Sanctions is taken off calendar. The parties have stipulated to the deposition of 54 Reckless LLC. If the tentative ruling is not contested, the court will sign the stipulation and proposed order without need for any appearances. Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey R. Windsor; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Application And Application For Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARGARET J. GROVER, TEL. NO. (925) 395-2380 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CINDY CHAN OF THE BLAKELY LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. (323) 464-7400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF SPARKART GROUP, INC.'S Application For Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment as to 54 Reckless, LLC is Granted. Plaintiff has established the probability of its claim. This is a case where attachment can be issued and claim is ascertainable. Plaintiff to post bond in the amount of $ 10,000.00 ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-10-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Application And Application For Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Continued To Jun-20-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Application And Application For Hearing For Right To Attach Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Continued To Jun-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SPARKART GROUP, INC.'s Application For Right To Attach Order and Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment is Continued on the court's own motion to June 12, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than May 14, 2013 at 4:00 pm. The Court has the motion and reply. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
